summary.summary: Alerting fixes and related UI/workflow changes: (1) removes a leftover "Acknowledge all alerts" pump‑setup UI and the backing ack path (commit:49460f79d5c8; files: file:f83d4a128bc1, file:83a0b15e0b58, file:2151a0e852b3; diff:fc6c9af9f88f). (2) Improves the alarm tone picker UI by adding a selectable check icon, separating the preview button, and pinning tint to the app color (commit:347d2b964eaf; commit:9aab08ee731d; file:93f974a4c103; diff:fc6c9af9f88f). (3) Clears legacy "not looping" notifications on startup by removing pending/delivered requests with identifiers Trio.noLoopFirstNotification and Trio.noLoopSecondNotification (commit:a582dac8b248; file:ee4c8d034d1d; diff:fc6c9af9f88f). (4) Adds a cold‑start replay path that reconstructs or silently acknowledges unacknowledged history entries at launch (new AlertColdStartReplay type, replayUnacknowledgedAlerts on TrioAlertManager, and an invocation from app startup) (commit:13024e417baf; files: file:9ca0afa3b974, file:07b045c7a152, file:44bcce5187fb; diff:fc6c9af9f88f). (5) Adjusts alert history storage and acknowledgement semantics: adds acknowledgeAllEntries(managerIdentifier:alertIdentifier:) and makes removeAlert only delete unacknowledged rows (file:fa46407a7876; diff:fc6c9af9f88f). (6) Reconciles modal/banner state with both delivered and pending UN requests and authorization status when determining stale banners, and updates snooze/dismiss flows to acknowledge (history + device) rather than silently retract entries (file:07b045c7a152; diff:fc6c9af9f88f). (7) Adds tests for cold‑start replay and alert history acknowledgement and wires the new tests into the Xcode project (file:0411f5f07671, file:5e2137bfada6; diff:fc6c9af9f88f).
summary.userFacingImpact: Conservative summary of user-visible effects: the "Acknowledge all alerts" button has been removed from the pump‑setup screen (commit:49460f79d5c8; file:2151a0e852b3). The alarm sound picker has clearer selection and preview targets and consistent app tinting (commit:347d2b964eaf; commit:9aab08ee731d; file:93f974a4c103). On upgrade, legacy "Last loop was X min ago" notifications scheduled by the old path will be cleared so they should not fire after updating (commit:a582dac8b248; file:ee4c8d034d1d). After app restart, previously unacknowledged alerts may be re‑presented in‑app (replay) or be silently acknowledged for glucose‑family alerts per the new cold‑start logic (commit:13024e417baf; file:9ca0afa3b974; file:07b045c7a152). Acknowledgement behavior is changed so acknowledgements apply to all matching history entries (acknowledgeAllEntries) and removal now preserves acknowledged history (file:fa46407a7876; file:0411f5f07671). These user‑facing behaviors and the code paths implementing them are shown in the listed commits/files; if you need verification of behavioral details (timings, snooze semantics, exact identifiers affected) please perform a human review of the referenced diffs and tests (diff:fc6c9af9f88f; file:9ca0afa3b974; file:07b045c7a152).
